zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Newmarch於大約1211年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親James de Newmarch43歲，母親Matilda32歲。她於大約1210年與John de Botreaux結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1244年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Newmarch于大约1211年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲James de Newmarch43岁，母亲Matilda32岁。她于大约1210年与John de Botreaux结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1244年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from any of the places in Normandy, Picardy, and Artois named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in N France named ( Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The Domesday Book under-tenant came from Le Quesnay in Seine-Maritime (see Anglo-Norman Families ). The place-names all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (Medieval Latin casnetum).

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Newmarch was born about 1211, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, James de Newmarch, was 43 and her mother, Matilda, was 32. She married John de Botreaux about 1210. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1244, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Newmarch est née environ 1211, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James de Newmarch, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John de Botreaux environ 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1244, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Newmarch um 1211 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Newmarch 43 und ihre Mutter Matilda 32. Sie hat um 1210 John de Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Newmarch è nata il circa 1211 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James de Newmarch, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Matilda, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John de Botreaux circa 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1244, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Newmarchが約1211年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父James de Newmarchは43歳，母Matildaは32歳であった。約1210年にJohn de Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Newmarch(이)가 대략 1211년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Newmarch(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 John de Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Newmarch nasceu aproximadamente 1211, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James de Newmarch, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Botreaux aproximadamente 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1244, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Newmarch родилась около 1211 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James de Newmarch было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Botreaux около 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1244 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Newmarch nació aproximadamente 1211, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James de Newmarch, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John de Botreaux aproximadamente 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1244, a la edad de 34 años.
